legal.heading: Legal & Privacy
legal.dataCollectionBody: We collect your phone number only when you voluntarily provide it during the RSVP process on this website.
legal.useOfInfoBody: We use your number to send transactional wedding updates (such as RSVP reminders or schedule changes) and occasional future family-related announcements, including thank you notes, holiday greetings, or milestone celebrations.
legal.mobilePrivacyBody: We do not share, sell, or rent your mobile information or consent data to any third parties or affiliates for marketing or promotional purposes. All text messaging originator opt-in data and consent is excluded from any information sharing.
legal.smsItem1: You will receive transactional updates regarding the Yonatan & Saron wedding, including RSVP reminders, schedule changes, and future family announcements.
legal.smsItem2: You can cancel the SMS service at any time. Just text STOP to the short code. After you send the SMS message STOP to us, we will send you an SMS message to confirm that you have been unsubscribed. After this, you will no longer receive SMS messages from us. If you want to join again, just sign up as you did the first time and we will start sending SMS messages to you again.
legal.smsItem3: If you are experiencing issues with the messaging program you can reply with the keyword HELP for more assistance, or you can get help directly at theestifanos@gmail.com.
legal.smsItem4: Carriers are not liable for delayed or undelivered messages.
legal.smsItem5: As always, message and data rates may apply for any messages sent to you from us and to us from you. Message frequency varies. If you have any questions about your text plan or data plan, it is best to contact your wireless provider.
legal.smsItem6: If you have any questions regarding privacy, please read our privacy policy above.

login.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
login.vipPasswordFilled: Your VIP password has been pre-filled.
login.welcomeBack: Welcome back! Your password is pre-filled.

preloader.message1: Glory to God for this beautiful season! We are so excited to share our story with you.
preloader.message2: We have a strict guest limit we need to stick to, so if you did not receive a Save the Date via email or phone number, we unfortunately cannot accommodate you. We love you dearly and appreciate your understanding.
preloader.message3: The Registry is open to everyone — no invite needed for that one.

journey.heading: Our Journey
journey.subtitle: What you're about to see is just a glimpse — a few snapshots of how God quietly wrote this story between two people who had no idea what He was up to. The full testimony is one we're still in awe of, and Lord willing, we'll share it with you in full over our wedding weekend. For now, we hope these moments give you a small window into the grace, the patience, and the faithfulness that brought us here.

venue.caption2: God has been faithful in our story.
venue.caption3_1: Now we invite you to share our joy
venue.rsvpHint: Please RSVP below and we will contact you soon about day-of plan and address

scripture.verse: This is the day that the Lord has made; let us rejoice and be glad in it.

party.heading: The Wedding Party
party.subtitle: The friends who've been with us every step of the way
party.count: (Yes, there are 22 of them. No, we could not narrow it down. Yes, we tried.)
party.parentsDescription: We are so grateful for the parents who have loved and supported us through every season of our lives. As we prepare for our wedding day, we want to honor them for their prayers, their presence, and for everything they’ve done to help us reach this beautiful milestone. We love them deeply and are honored to have them by our side.

rsvp.heading: RSVP
rsvp.searchPrompt: Please enter the first and last name of one member of your party below. If you're responding for you and a guest (or your family), you'll be able to RSVP for your entire group on the next page.
rsvp.notFound: We couldn't find your invitation. Please try a different spelling or contact the couple.
rsvp.timeout: Request timed out. Please check your connection and try again.
rsvp.multipleFound: We found a few parties that match. Please select the one that includes your name.
rsvp.noGuests: No guests found for this party.
rsvp.contactCouple: Please contact the couple if this seems incorrect.
rsvp.smsConsent: I consent to receive text messages regarding the wedding and future family updates. Message frequency varies. Msg & data rates may apply. Reply HELP for help, STOP to opt out. Read our
rsvp.errorEmail: Please enter a valid email address
rsvp.errorPhone: Please enter a valid phone number (10-15 digits)
rsvp.errorConsent: Please consent to receive updates to complete your RSVP.
rsvp.errorGuestName: Please enter a name for each attending guest
rsvp.submitError: Failed to submit RSVP. Please try again.
rsvp.notMyFamily: Not the {name}? Search for your invitation
rsvp.openInstruction: Click & hold the seal to open
rsvp.thankYouMessage: {name}, your response has been recorded. We look forward to celebrating with you!
rsvp.registryNote: Your presence at our celebration means the world to us and is truly all we need. For those who have kindly asked about gifts, we've put together a registry to help with coordination.
rsvp.alreadyRespondedMessage: {name}, we've already received your RSVP. Thank you for confirming!
rsvp.alreadyRespondedNote: If you need to make changes to your response, please contact us directly.
rsvp.alreadyRespondedConfirmation: Your party has already responded. We will contact you soon with more information and final weekend details. We love you and can't wait to celebrate together!
rsvp.editResponse: Need to change your response? Click here to edit.

registry.heading: Registry
registry.description: Sharing this day with you is the only gift we require. For those who have expressed an interest in offering a token of love, we have curated a collection of items for our future home.
registry.empty: Our registry is being prepared. Please check back soon!
registry.thankYouNote: Thank you for celebrating this special day with us. Your love and support mean the world to us.
registry.modalHeading: You're Helping Us Build Our Home
registry.sendToAddress: Please send it to our doorstep:
registry.thankYouDetails: Kindly leave your details so we may express our gratitude properly.
registry.yourEmail: Your Email (for our thank you note)
registry.loveToHear: We'd love to hear from you...
registry.successMessage: Thank you. We are honored by your generosity. Can't wait to celebrate with you!
registry.onItsWay: On its way to our home
